case_title: JERRY L CADDY VS. YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER COMPELLING PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $473.80

PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JAN-06-2005.

DBA YELLOW CAB CO. HEARING SET FOR FEB-03-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612
ARBITRATOR RALPH RHOADES APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-07-2005 THROUGH APR-07-2005.

BRADY, WALTER DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-29-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-27-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-14-2004
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BRADY, WALTER
MEDICAL REIMBURSEMENT LIEN SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CODE SEC 124
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-09-2005 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. THAT PLAINTIFF, JERRY L. CADDY, RECOVER JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY FROM DEFENDANTS WALTER BRADY AND YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. THE SUM OF $11,624.00. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THIER OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. DBA YELLOW CAB CO.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JAMES ROMINE TAGGART.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND AND TO RESPOND FULLY WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND AND TO RESPOND FURTHER WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $473.80, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-05-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
